name: Field COMP
description: '''Note''': Field COMP deprecated build 2022.24200, use [[Text COMP]]. The Field Component lets you enter text strings and renders text generated with the [[Text TOP]]. Internally it contains a Text TOP which points to one cell of a DAT that contains the text to render. The Field COMP modifies the DAT cell as text is entered. [[image:FieldCOMP.png]]

parameters.name: Field Type
parameters.label: Field Type
parameters.description: Specify what kind of data can be input into the field.

parameters.name: Enable Field Format Numbers
parameters.label: Enable Field Format Numbers
parameters.description: Use when Field Type is set to 'Float' or 'Integer' to add formatting options to the number display.

parameters.name: Field Total Digits
parameters.label: Field Total Digits
parameters.description: Use when Field Type is set to 'Float' or 'Integer' to set the total number of digits that will be displayed.

parameters.name: Field Decimal Digits
parameters.label: Field Decimal Digits
parameters.description: Use when Field Type is set to 'Float' to set the total number of decimal digits, digits after the decimal place.

parameters.name: Field Trailing Zeros
parameters.label: Field Trailing Zeros
parameters.description: Use when Field Type is set to 'Float' to activate trailing zeros to fill the total digits setting.

parameters.name: Field Leading Zero
parameters.label: Field Leading Zero
parameters.description: Use when Field Type is set to 'Float' to activate leading zeros to fill the total digits setting.

parameters.name: Field Lock
parameters.label: Field Lock
parameters.description: When checked on the field can not be edited.

parameters.name: Expand Tscript Variables
parameters.label: Expand Tscript Variables
parameters.description: Will expand any variables that are input into the field.

parameters.name: Render Password Protected
parameters.label: Render Password Protected
parameters.description: Renders all characters as "*", useful for hiding strings in password fields.

parameters.name: Allow Multi-Line Input
parameters.label: Allow Multi-Line Input
parameters.description: Toggle this one to allow for multi-line inputs in the field. When off text entry is limited to a single line.

parameters.name: Enter as Newline with no Shift
parameters.label: Enter as Newline with no Shift
parameters.description: <Enter> key works as newline (carriage return) so you do not have to hold down shift for a newline.

parameters.name: Render Cursor
parameters.label: Render Cursor
parameters.description: Toggle this setting to turn on and off the cursor display in the field.

parameters.name: Focus Order
parameters.label: Focus Order
parameters.description: The path to a DAT with a list of field component focus orders. The DAT should container a list of paths relative to the DAT parent in the focus order. When the user hits <tab> or <shift+tab> the focus will automatically be set to the field before or after the entry for this field. If the path for this field is not specified in focus order table, the focus will remain unchanged.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the live Field_COMP wiki page
